description: Append-only event-journal contract for replay-authoritative Command Doctor lesson attempts.
ordering_rules: event_id must be unique within an attempt journal
sequence starts at 1 and is contiguous
timestamps must parse and be non-decreasing
the first event must be attempt_created
all identity fields must match the attempt identity
stage events must reference a stage in the matching lesson definition
stage events must reference a stage applicable to the attempt mode

student_response_events.required_payload: sanitized response sufficient to rerun the controlled evaluator
student_response_events.restore_rule: serialized evaluator_result is advisory only and must not create credit

trusted_evidence_events.required_payload: sanitized full evidence envelope plus controlled provider receipt
trusted_evidence_events.restore_rule: the matching provider must revalidate the stored envelope before execution or verification credit is restored
